name: Mei 12x20 Tiny Home Plan - Modern Compact Living with Timeless Style
open_features: An efficient footprint that maximizes interior usability while remaining compact, cost-effective, and ideal for small lots.
Straightforward framing, clean lines, and easy-to-follow plans suitable for confident beginners and experienced builders alike.
Designed to accommodate a sleeping area, kitchenette, seating or workspace, and optional bathroom configuration.
Warm wood siding, clean trim details, and balanced proportions create a modern yet inviting tiny home exterior.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard living upgrade with the Mei Tiny Home Plan - a 12x20 modern tiny home designed for efficiency, comfort, and clean architectural simplicity. With its streamlined form, warm wood siding, and thoughtfully designed openings, the Mei delivers contemporary style paired with practical, everyday livability. Whether you're building a backyard tiny home, guest house, ADU, home office, or creative retreat, the Mei 12x20 offers smart space planning, DIY-friendly construction,...
